items.title: Make the mobile loop a real General Manager decision deck
items.insight: The mobile overlay already compresses the franchise into a single-column view, but its action row is static and misses the highest-pressure next decision. A narrow beta tester should see the next meaningful General Manager move immediately: draft board, injury triage, cap cleanup, trade deadline, or advance week.
items.recipe: Add a pure `buildMobileDecisionDeck()` helper that derives two to three prioritized mobile actions from phase, week, cap, injuries, draft, roster needs, and news; render those actions in `renderMobileOverlay()`; add focused tests for draft, cap/injury, and default advance-week states.

items.title: Attach a compact franchise fingerprint to beta feedback
items.insight: The beta issue URL now carries launch readiness, but it still loses the franchise state that explains why a report matters. A privacy-safe fingerprint with team, record, cap posture, top roster need, and active pressure lets feedback be triaged as gameplay balance, roster logic, or deployment friction without analytics or accounts.
items.recipe: Add `buildFeedbackContextFingerprint()` as a pure helper, include optional fingerprint lines in `buildFeedbackIssueUrl()`, gather the snapshot in `openFeedback()`, and test that the body includes gameplay context without tokens, emails, or save payloads.

items.title: Backfill missing closeout protocol scripts locally
items.insight: Startup has repo-local shims, but closeout still references missing cost and impact-brief scripts, which makes every session carry avoidable protocol drift. Public-safe local shims keep the documented `/closeout` surface executable while private Studio OS remains the source of deeper operations.
items.recipe: Add `scripts/record-skill-cost.mjs` and `scripts/render-closeout-brief.mjs` with public-safe behavior, wire tests that both scripts load and emit/write expected artifacts, and keep outputs secret-redacted and local to `.cache`/`docs`.

skipped.reason: Still requires Cloudflare/GitHub org-root capability that is missing from this repo; keep it surfaced as an agent-attemptable blocker with the existing runbook.
Best deferred until beta feedback produces real decision traces; otherwise the critique model would invent player habits.
